full_text:
Yu Fan (Zhongxiang) 虞翻 (仲翔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Fan (虞翻), styledZhongxiang (仲翔), was born in Kuaiji. Advisor to Wang Lang. Surrendered to Sun Ce. Convinced Mi Fang, Fu Shiren to defect to Wu. Yu Fan was affiliated with Wang Lang and the Wu Kingdom. Yu Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
